About: It is an American opera company.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Puccini's Madama Butterfly.
BuiltIn: It was built on a newly acquired former guest ranch of 199 acres.
CreatedFor: It was created for American singers to learn and perform new roles.
FoundedBy: It was founded by John Crosby.
HasA: It has a seating capacity of nearly 500.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by introducing new operas.
It is characterized by its productions of the standard operatic repertoire.
It is characterized by staging American premieres.
It is characterized by staging world premieres.
It is characterized by presenting five operas each season during the summer.
It is characterized by its Apprentice Singer Program.
It is characterized by its Apprentice Program for Technicians.
It is characterized by its COVID-safe protocols.
It is characterized by simulcasts of dress rehearsals and shows broadcast outside as a drive-in theater.
HeldIn: It was held in Santa Fe, New Mexico.
KnownFor: It is known for introducing new operas.
It is known for its productions of the standard operatic repertoire.
LocatedIn: It is located 7 miles north of Santa Fe, New Mexico.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the summer festival season since July 1957.
It occurred in the summer.
It occurred in the 1950s.
It occurred in 1956.
It occurred in July 1957.
It occurred in 2000.
It occurred in 2008.
It occurred in October 2008.
It occurred in September 2020.
It occurred in 2021.
UsedFor: It is used for showcasing apprentice singers.
It is used for providing instruction in stage operations.
It is used for providing instruction in stage properties.
It is used for providing instruction in costume and wig construction.
It is used for providing instruction in scenic art.
It is used for providing instruction in wigs and make up.
It is used for providing instruction in music services.
It is used for providing instruction in stage lighting.
It is used for providing instruction in voice.
It is used for providing instruction in music.
UsedIn: It is used in professional productions.
UsedTo: It is used to give American singers the opportunity to learn and perform new roles.
It is used to make the transition from academic to professional life.
It is used to cover major roles.
It is used to perform small roles.
It is used to fill positions crucial to the live running of productions.
It is used to showcase apprentice singers.
It is used to serve as costume and lighting designers.
It is used to serve as lighting and stage supervisors.
It is used to serve as follow spot operators.
It is used to serve as assistant stage managers.
